points.point1: Created a CSS box-shadow generator tool using vanilla JavaScript.
points.point2: Implemented a real-time preview for instant visual feedback.
points.point3: Added fully customizable options for all box-shadow properties.

points.point1: Engineered a full-stack PWA, installable on iOS/Android for a native-like experience.
points.point2: Integrated secure user authentication and data persistence using MongoDB.
points.point3: Implemented robust data validation with Zod and schema-based access control.
points.point4: Designed a cursor-based pagination system for highly efficient backend data retrieval.

points.point1: Designed the system with a strong focus on scalability, clear separation of concerns, and predictable state management, applying well-defined patterns across both frontend and backend.
points.point2: Implemented a true offline-first approach, ensuring data consistency and uninterrupted user experience regardless of network connectivity.
points.point3: Designed the project with a strong balance between user experience and technical robustness, carefully weighing architectural decisions, performance, and usability.
points.point4: Owned the entire stack and all architectural decisions, approaching the project as a production-grade product from end to end

points.point1: Developed a full-stack MERN application for robust task management.
points.point2: Structured a clean REST API with Express and Mongoose for all core functionalities.
points.point3: Implemented secure, token-based user authentication using JWT.
points.point4: Built a responsive, component-based UI with React and CSS Modules.

points.point1: Developed a full-stack social media PWA using the MERN stack.
points.point2: Implemented robust data validation with Zod and schema-based access control.
points.point3: Integrated cursor-based pagination for a seamless infinite-scroll experience.
points.point4: Designed a layout system inspired by SwiftUI using vertical and horizontal stacks.

points.point1: Published an open-source React component library that mimics SwiftUI's stack-based layout system.
points.point2: Facilitated rapid UI development with intuitive VerticalStack and HorizontalStack components.
points.point3: Ensured responsiveness and flexibility through customizable props and styles.
points.point4: Maintained comprehensive documentation and examples for easy adoption by developers.

points.point1: Developed a digital sticky notes application using vanilla JavaScript.
points.point2: Implemented instant search functionality to filter notes.
points.point3: Integrated browser local storage for persistent note-saving.
points.point4: Added a data export feature to save notes as a CSV file.

points.point1: Crafted a responsive weather application using React and Tailwind CSS.
points.point2: Integrated the OpenWeather API for live, real-time weather data.
points.point3: Added GeoDB API support for dynamic location search.
